subject: english
topic_title: Essay Writing: Argumentative Essay on Child Abuse
learning_objectives: Identify the focus of the argumentative topic
Choose and defend one side of the argument
Develop supporting points from the note

sections.heading: Task
sections.content: The lesson asks students to argue who is to blame for child abuse, choosing either government or parents.

sections.heading: Sample Points in the Note
sections.content: If parents are chosen, the note lists poor family planning, lack of proper formal and moral education, poverty, poor upbringing, covetousness, and harmful corporal punishment as supporting points.
